heroSubtitle: Transforming charitable giving through blockchain technology. We ensure every donation is tracked, transparent, and delivers real impact.
whoWeAreDesc: We are a trusted bridge between donors and vetted charities in Qatar, empowered by technology to guarantee transparency and impact.
card1Desc: Every charity and campaign on our platform is strictly vetted and approved by Qatar's RACA (Regulatory Authority for Charitable Activities).
card2Desc: Our blockchain integration ensures that every transaction is immutable, trackable, and visible to the donor from start to finish.
card3Desc: We build long-term relationships based on honesty. Our donors give with confidence knowing their money reaches those who need it most.
missionDesc: To connect generous donors with verified charities through a seamless, transparent, and secure platform.
sandiDesc: Sandi is Qatar's national platform for charitable and social aid management. It ensures fairness, security, and transparency in donations by unifying data across organizations, preventing fraud, and building trust between donors, charities, and beneficiaries.
sandiCard1Desc: Validates beneficiary IDs instantly against the national registry.
sandiCard2Desc: Maintains a unified record to prevent duplication of aid.
sandiCard3Desc: Enables different charities to coordinate their relief efforts effectively.
visionMissionSubtitle: Driving the future of transparent charitable giving in Qatar.
missionBoxDesc: Empowering donors with real-time tracking and immutable proof of impact.
visionBoxDesc: A world where every charitable contribution is transparent, verifiable, and maximized for social good.
stepDonorDesc: Selects a campaign and makes a secure donation.
stepCharityDesc: Receives funds and executes the project locally.
stepSandiSyncDesc: Transaction is instantly logged on the blockchain.
slideRacaDesc: Strict alignment and regular verification with government regulations.
slideAuditsDesc: Regular independent financial and compliance audits for total tracking accountability.
slideSandiSyncDesc: Transactions are instantly logged on the state blockchain ledger.
slideLiveCommDesc: Continuous review and real-time reporting back on the project status until completion.
slideImpactDesc: Direct tracking links generated automatically to prove ground reality changes.
oversightFooterNote: Ensuring accountability, compliance, and trust at every step.
joinDesc: Start your journey of transparent, impactful giving today. Every donation is tracked, verified, and makes a real difference.
